69ebd8154997b6575109759a.question: Jean Cocteau wrote the libretto to a Darius Milhaud opera about a “Poor” person in this profession, which only has four unnamed characters. Despite having a stammer, a character with this profession is labeled “a find in a thousand.” A man with this profession who is admired by Josephine is switched at birth by Mrs. Cripps, otherwise known as Little Buttercup, in an opera whose characters include Dick Deadeye. “The smartest lad” Ralph Rackstraw has this profession in a Gilbert and Sullivan opera. A character with this profession sings “Starry Vere, God Bless you!” before his execution in a Benjamin Britten opera that includes John Claggart. For 10 points, name this profession of Billy Budd.

Despite having a stammer, a character with this profession is labeled "a find in a thousand." A man with this profession who is admired by Josephine is switched at birth by Mrs. Cripps, otherwise known as Little Buttercup, in an opera whose characters include Dick Deadeye. "The smartest lad" Ralph Rackstraw has this profession in a Gilbert and Sullivan opera. A character with this profession sings "Starry Vere, God Bless you!" before his execution in a Benjamin Britten opera that includes John Claggart. For 10 points, name this profession of Billy Budd.

69ebd8164997b657510975f1.question: In 1950, RCA Victor made a recording of this opera featuring Leonard Warren in the lead role alongside soprano Erna Berger. Tenor Raffaele Mirate was reprimanded for whistling the tune of a B major aria from this opera that opens with three accented notes on D-sharp. A coloratura soprano sings the line “Sweet name that made my heart” in this opera’s aria “Caro nome che il mio cor,” who believes a character is named Gualtier Maldè. This opera was originally titled La maledizione (“MAL-uh-dits-YOH-neh”) or “The Curse,” in reference to an exclamation after Gilda is murdered by Sparafucile. The aria “La donna è mobile” is from, for 10 points, what opera about the Duke of Mantua and the title jester, composed by Giuseppe Verdi?
69ebd8164997b657510975f1.question_sanitized: In 1950, RCA Victor made a recording of this opera featuring Leonard Warren in the lead role alongside soprano Erna Berger. Tenor Raffaele Mirate was reprimanded for whistling the tune of a B major aria from this opera that opens with three accented notes on D-sharp. A coloratura soprano sings the line "Sweet name that made my heart" in this opera's aria "Caro nome che il mio cor," who believes a character is named Gualtier Malde. This opera was originally titled La maledizione ("MAL-uh-dits-YOH-neh") or "The Curse," in reference to an exclamation after Gilda is murdered by Sparafucile. The aria "La donna e mobile" is from, for 10 points, what opera about the Duke of Mantua and the title jester, composed by Giuseppe Verdi?

69ebd8174997b65751097647.question: This word’s adjectival form is the first in the title of an opera in which Joseph De Rocher is spiritually advised by Sister Helen Prejean in Louisiana. This is the first title word in the first opera by Jake Heggie. This word is the first in the title of an opera in which the line “There is so much to get through” is sung in the Chorus of Exiled Jews. Molqi shoots a man offstage in an opera titled for this noun, and his corpse sings the “Aria of the Falling Body.” A Jewish passenger is murdered aboard the Achille Lauro in a John Adams opera whose title opens with this word. Klinghoffer experiences, for 10 points, what fate, which befalls Don Giovanni when he is dragged to hell?
69ebd8174997b65751097647.question_sanitized: This word's adjectival form is the first in the title of an opera in which Joseph De Rocher is spiritually advised by Sister Helen Prejean in Louisiana. This is the first title word in the first opera by Jake Heggie. This word is the first in the title of an opera in which the line "There is so much to get through" is sung in the Chorus of Exiled Jews. Molqi shoots a man offstage in an opera titled for this noun, and his corpse sings the "Aria of the Falling Body." 69ebd8174997b65751097647.answer: death [or dead; or Dead Man Walking; or The Death of Klinghoffer]

69ebd8174997b657510976a4.question: In a play titled for this animal, a man notes that he was once voted “least likely to be invited to a party,” which is ironic because partygoers all across Europe at that moment discuss his stupidity. A man compares having power over women to a needle and this animal in a metaphor that leads to the man lying to his wife, Helga, and being promoted to Vice-Consul. This animal titles a play in which a French diplomat falls in love with a Chinese singer, unaware that the singer is actually a man. Rene Gallimard has an affair with Song Liling in a David Henry Hwang play partly titled for this animal. For 10 points, give this animal that symbolically names Song’s role in a Giacomo Puccini opera.
69ebd8174997b657510976a4.question_sanitized: In a play titled for this animal, a man notes that he was once voted "least likely to be invited to a party," which is ironic because partygoers all across Europe at that moment discuss his stupidity. 69ebd8194997b6575109773b.leadin: This opera was the only one made in collaboration between its composer and librettist Constance DeJong. For 10 points each:
69ebd8194997b6575109773b.leadin_sanitized: This opera was the only one made in collaboration between its composer and librettist Constance DeJong. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this opera about a lawyer and politician, whose first act is named after Leo Tolstoy. This opera’s title roughly translates to “truth force.”
Satyagraha is the second in this group of operas, which focus on leaders who changed history. In the first opera from this group, repetitive “knee plays” separate acts.
Einstein on the Beach and Satyagraha are part of the Portrait Trilogy by this minimalist American composer. This composer is also known for scores of movies such as Koyaanisqatsi.
parts_sanitized: Name this opera about a lawyer and politician, whose first act is named after Leo Tolstoy. This opera's title roughly translates to "truth force."
Satyagraha is the second in this group of operas, which focus on leaders who changed history. In the first opera from this group, repetitive "knee plays" separate acts.
Einstein on the Beach and Satyagraha are part of the Portrait Trilogy by this minimalist American composer. This composer is also known for scores of movies such as Koyaanisqatsi.

69ebd8194997b65751097751.question: In 2013, Peter Sellars produced an unfinished semi-opera by this composer for which the artist Gronk creates Mayan-inspired art to blend with the Mesoamerican characters Montezuma and King Inca. This composer may have made fun of Elkanah Settle in an opera featuring a stuttering poet in a scene in which Titania argues with Oberon. This composer of The Indian Queen wrote a G minor aria that falls chromatically from G to D. The aria “What Power art thou” was composed by this man for the “Frost Scene” from his opera King Arthur. The line “Remember me, but ah! Forget my fate” concludes this composer’s lamentful aria “When I am laid in earth.” For 10 points, name this English composer of Dido and Aeneas.

The line "Remember me, but ah! Forget my fate" concludes this composer's lamentful aria "When I am laid in earth." For 10 points, name this English composer of Dido and Aeneas.

69ebd81a4997b65751097799.question: In an opera by this composer, Imogene falls in love with a Count of Montalto named Gualtiero, who survives a shipwreck. This composer reworked the Romeo and Juliet story into the opera I Capuleti e I Montecchi, one of his collaborations with Felice Romani. In an opera by this composer, the aria “Ah! non credea mirarti” (“ah nawn kray-DAY-uh mee-RAHR-tee”) is sung by Amina after she fails to woo Elvino. This composer of Il pirata wrote an opera whose title character sings a cavatina in which she approaches an altar and sings about a “Chaste goddess,” or “Casta diva.” Polliane, a proconsul of Gaul, dies with the title Druid priestess in an opera by this bel canto composer. For 10 points, name this composer of La Sonnambula and Norma.
